    1. applyVector(VectorFacade, VectorFacade, VectorMask)

Interface VectorizedFilter

All Superinterfaces:
Filter
All Known Implementing Classes:
CountFilter, MaskFilter.VectorizedMaskFilter
public interface VectorizedFilter extends Filter

    Description
    void
    applyVector(VectorFacade get, VectorFacade set, VectorMask<Short> mask)
    Applies a filter to a vector pair of get and set.

  • Method Details

    • applyVector

      void applyVector(VectorFacade get, VectorFacade set, VectorMask<Short> mask)
      Applies a filter to a vector pair of get and set.
      Parameters:
      get - the get vector
      set - the set vector
      mask - the mask with the lanes set to true which should be affected by the filter
